scatter-gather.doc:name: Query Flagship Hospital + Community Clinic in parallel

ee:message.ee:set-payload: #[ %dw 2.0 output application/json var snomedToIcd10 = { "44054006": { icd10: "E11.9", display: "Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus" }, "38341003": { icd10: "I10", display: "Essential Hypertension" }, "195967001": { icd10: "J45.909", display: "Asthma, Unspecified" }, "431855005": { icd10: "N18.3", display: "Chronic Kidney Disease, Stage 3" }, "370143000": { icd10: "F32.1", display: "Major Depressive Disorder" }, "55822004": { icd10: "E78.5", display: "Hyperlipidemia" }, "84114007": { icd10: "I50.9", display: "Heart Failure, Unspecified" }, "13645005": { icd10: "J44.1", display: "COPD with Acute Exacerbation" }, "233604007": { icd10: "I25.10", display: "Coronary Artery Disease" }, "40930008": { icd10: "I48.91", display: "Atrial Fibrillation" }, "73211009": { icd10: "E11.9", display: "Diabetes Mellitus" }, "15777000": { icd10: "E11.65", display: "Diabetes with Hyperglycemia" }, "46635009": { icd10: "E11.9", display: "Diabetes Mellitus Type 1" }, "162864005": { icd10: "R73.09", display: "Prediabetes" } } var patientId = attributes.uriParams.patientId var source = if (patientId startsWith "cs-") "Flagship Hospital" else "Community Clinic" --- if (payload.entry != null) (payload.entry map (entry) -> do { var coding = entry.resource.code.coding[0] var snomedCode = coding.code default "" var mapping = snomedToIcd10[snomedCode] --- { patientId: patientId, code: if (mapping != null) mapping.icd10 else snomedCode, display: if (mapping != null) mapping.display else (coding.display default entry.resource.code.text default "Unknown"), onsetDate: (entry.resource.onsetDateTime[0 to 9]) default "Unknown", source: source } }) else [] ]

#[ %dw 2.0 output application/json var csResults = payload."0".payload var mtResults = payload."1".payload
fun normalizeEntry(entry, prefix, source) = { patientId: prefix ++ "-" ++ ((entry.resource.subject.reference splitBy "/")[-1])[0 to 7], code: entry.resource.code.coding[0].code default "Unknown", display: entry.resource.code.coding[0].display default entry.resource.code.text default "Unknown", onsetDate: (entry.resource.onsetDateTime[0 to 9]) default "Unknown", source: source } --- (if (csResults.entry != null) (csResults.entry map normalizeEntry($, "cs", "Flagship Hospital")) else []) ++ (if (mtResults.entry != null) (mtResults.entry map normalizeEntry($, "mt", "Community Clinic")) else []) ]

#[ %dw 2.0 output application/json var patientId = attributes.uriParams.patientId var source = if (patientId startsWith "cs-") "Flagship Hospital" else "Community Clinic" --- if (payload.entry != null) (payload.entry filter ($.resource.valueQuantity.value != null) map (entry) -> { patientId: patientId, code: entry.resource.code.coding[0].code default "Unknown", display: entry.resource.code.coding[0].display default entry.resource.code.text default "Unknown", value: entry.resource.valueQuantity.value, unit: entry.resource.valueQuantity.unit default "", date: (entry.resource.effectiveDateTime[0 to 9]) default "Unknown", source: source }) else [] ]

#[ %dw 2.0 output application/json var patientId = attributes.uriParams.patientId var source = if (patientId startsWith "cs-") "Flagship Hospital" else "Community Clinic" --- if (payload.entry != null) (payload.entry map (entry) -> { patientId: patientId, name: entry.resource.medicationCodeableConcept.coding[0].display default entry.resource.medicationCodeableConcept.text default "Unknown", code: entry.resource.medicationCodeableConcept.coding[0].code default "Unknown", status: entry.resource.status default "unknown", dosage: entry.resource.dosageInstruction[0].text default "Not specified", dateWritten: (entry.resource.authoredOn[0 to 9]) default "Unknown", source: source }) else [] ]

#[ %dw 2.0 output application/json var patientId = attributes.uriParams.patientId var source = if (patientId startsWith "cs-") "Flagship Hospital" else "Community Clinic" --- if (payload.entry != null) (payload.entry map (entry) -> { patientId: patientId, substance: entry.resource.code.coding[0].display default entry.resource.code.text default "Unknown", category: entry.resource.category[0] default "unknown", criticality: entry.resource.criticality default "unknown", status: entry.resource.clinicalStatus.coding[0].code default "unknown", reaction: entry.resource.reaction[0].manifestation[0].coding[0].display default entry.resource.reaction[0].manifestation[0].text default "Not documented", recordedDate: (entry.resource.recordedDate[0 to 9]) default "Unknown", source: source }) else [] ]

#[ %dw 2.0 output application/json var csCap = payload."0".payload var mtCap = payload."1".payload
fun serverInfo(cap, name) = { name: name, software: cap.software.name default "Unknown", softwareVersion: cap.software.version default "Unknown", fhirVersion: cap.fhirVersion default "Unknown", totalResourceTypes: sizeOf(cap.rest[0].resource default []), status: "connected" } --- [serverInfo(csCap, "Flagship Hospital"), serverInfo(mtCap, "Community Clinic")] ]
